# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent edge computing security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.123.0/http/server.ts";
import { parse } from "https://deno.land/std@0.123.0/flags/mod.ts";
import { existsSync, readFileSync } from "https://deno.land/std@0.123.0/fs/mod.ts";

const PORT = 8080;
const MODULE_PATHS: string[] = [];

// Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs
function validateInput(input: string): boolean {
  // Implement your own validation logic here
  return true;
}

async function handleRequest(req: Request) {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const pathname = url.pathname;

  if (pathname === "/") {
    // Handle root request
    return new Response("Welcome to the plugin system!", { status: 200 });
  } else if (pathname === "/modules") {
    // Handle module list request
    const modules = MODULE_PATHS.map((modulePath) => ({ path: modulePath }));
    return new Response(JSON.stringify(modules), { status: 200 });
  } else if (pathname === "/load") {
    // Handle module load request
    const query = parse(url.searchParams);
    const modulePath = query.get("module");
    if (!validateInput(modulePath)) {
      return new Response("Invalid input", { status: 400 });
    }
    try {
      // Dynamically import the module using the Deno Deploy edge runtime
      const module = await import(modulePath);
      return new Response(`Module loaded successfully: ${modulePath}`, {
        status: 200,
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      return new Response("Error loading module", { status: 500 });
    }
  } else {
    // Handle unknown request
    return new Response("Not found", { status: 404 });
  }
}

serve(handleRequest, { port: PORT });
